species.description: The Arapaima is a true icon of freshwater fishing.

content.title: Remote Expedition: Arapaima at Legendary Arapaima Ground 390
content.description: Journeying to Legendary Arapaima Ground 390 in Kenya is not for the faint of heart. This is raw, untouched fishing at its finest, where the Arapaima grow old and bold in the absence of commercial pressure.

fishing.regulations: Strict catch and release policies are in effect. Barbless hooks only.

editorial.introduction: Journeying to Legendary Arapaima Ground 390 in Kenya is not for the faint of heart. This is raw, untouched fishing at its finest, where the Arapaima grow old and bold in the absence of commercial pressure.

quote.text: There is no cell service, no dock, and no room for error. Just you and the Arapaima.
quote.author: Capt. Fisherman 390

sections.heading: Navigating the Wilds
sections.body:
Getting to these grounds requires a multi-day trek or a specialized bush plane. Once there, you'll be fishing in waters that see fewer than a dozen anglers a year.

Local experts emphasize that the key to success is staying mobile and checking your drag settings constantly.

sections.heading: Essential Gear for Survival
sections.body:
Reliability is everything when you're 200 miles from the nearest town. High-quality waterproof reels and multi-piece travel rods are the standard for this expedition.

Local experts emphasize that the key to success is staying mobile and checking your drag settings constantly.
